base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_score_digits_highlighted — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. 0-9 score digits — current player's score line rendered solid yellow. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 0-9 score digits — current player's score line rendered solid yellow; inactive player's line rendered cyan or white (per sheet note). Displays as 6-digit zero-padded
